title: Drybones
description: A Minimalistic, Trailer inspired Texture Pack
body:
# **Drybones**
## Welcome to Drybones
![Feature Image, Birch Forest Solas Shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4626c26e053fc7ef6dd50c5697959b672bd5103_0.webp)
  
### - This Pack is trying to turn Minecrafts look into something more minimalistic and in my opinion, more interesting. So try it out if you'd like. It's still in beta but please take a look.
- Progress currently
  - Blocks : 364 out of 1134 (**~32%**)
  - Items : 0 out of 748
  - Entitys/Mobs : 1 out of alot (im afraid i dont know the Number)
  - Misc. : 0
- Planned Things (Besides Completion of Blocks, Items...)
  - **Compatability Packs** for...
    - Create Mod (and a few addons too like Steam n' Rails)
    - Resources Extended (**Included in Preview 6 and up**)
    - Biomes o Plenty
    - and maybe more...
## **_LICENSE_**
> 
> **You are Allowed to** :
  - **Use this Resource Pack for Youtube Videos** and such but you have to **credit the Resource Pack** (via a Link or my Username on Modrinth)
  - **Take Inspiration (of course)**
  - **Create Addons** that extend or modify the content of this Resource Pack without including unmofified assets of this mod
> **You are NOT Allowed to** :
  -   **Upload the Resource Pack to another Platform without my Permission**
  -   Use my Assets for your Own/Commercial use without my Permission
,you can obtain Permission by DM´ing me on Discord (acnhgamrr)
> Otherwise all Rules of the **CC-BY-ND 4.0** License apply
- > If you have any other Questions contact me via Discord
